content:
Awesome! I'll say I have a preferable translation for the phrase when you have the time to plug it in:
> For each enemy, inflict `X` Temp. <ExhaustionIconKeywords:STR▼> on them and gain `X` Temp. <PowerIconKeywords:STR>.
thread_title: Can I omit Args? and can I add Rich Text Tags to lines that didn't have them?
